prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: 16:9 base image for a Remotion product video scene. Create a polished brand-neutral Japanese online news website inside a browser window on a warm cream background. The right half must be a clean feature-headline area with four large blank story rows: each row has a small red or blue category chip, a very faint gray placeholder line exactly where a headline would go, a tiny comment icon at far right, and generous white space. Do not put readable headline text in the four right rows. The overlay text will be added later, so keep the right rows quiet and aligned. The left half can show market charts, small thumbnail cards, ranking fragments, and generic unreadable UI text. Stylish premium editorial technology video, crisp layout, subtle shadows, restrained red accents, warm white cards. No real publication logos, no NewsPicks text, no black hole, no cursor, no Japanese gibberish in the right headline rows.

Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: square raster UI card to be absorbed by a black hole in a product video. Create a premium floating card of scattered web text fragments: short black and gray lines, one red warning word block, tiny Japanese-like unreadable UI fragments, no real readable sentences. Warm off-white card, subtle paper texture, soft shadow, stylish editorial SaaS look, centered with padding. No black hole, no cursor, no logos.
